# FERC Audit Explorer

> Machine-readable findings of noncompliance and staff recommendations from FERC's published audit reports (Office of Enforcement, Division of Audits & Accounting). Each report is parsed into findings -> recommendations, and cross-report themes are mined.

As of 2026-05-22, 2 of 71 listed audit reports are structured. Findings and recommendations are quoted verbatim from each report's Executive Summary. Primary source: https://www.ferc.gov/audits. This is an independent public-interest tool, not affiliated with FERC. Links below are relative to the site root.

## Data (machine-readable)
- [Reports](data/reports.json): every structured report with findings, recommendations, and themes
- [Patterns](data/patterns.json): cross-report themes with counts by industry and year
- [Meta](data/meta.json): corpus counts and provenance
- [Full corpus text](llms-full.txt): all findings and recommendations in one file (verbatim)

## Reports
- [Kern River Gas Transmission Company](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20250929-3000&optimized=false): Docket FA23-10-000, issued 2025-09-29, gas, 5 finding(s) — findings: Renewable Natural Gas Quality Specifications; Tariff Administration and Oversight; Informational Postings; Allowance for Funds Used During Construction; Annual Membership Dues
- [Medallion Pipeline Company, LLC](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20250925-3005&optimized=false): Docket FA23-9-000, issued 2025-09-25, oil, 8 finding(s) — findings: Annual Cost of Service Based Analysis Schedule; Nonoperating and Operating Expenses; Noncarrier Property Revenue, Expenses, and Net Income; Crude Oil Accounting Misclassifications; Other Accounting Misclassifications; Property Unit Listing; Depreciation Rates and Study; FERC Form No. 6 Reporting

## Common themes
- Accounting misclassification: 2 report(s), 6 finding(s)
- Property & plant records: 2 report(s), 4 finding(s)
- Cost of service & rates: 2 report(s), 3 finding(s)
- Depreciation: 2 report(s), 2 finding(s)
- Below-the-line costs (lobbying, charitable, etc.): 2 report(s), 2 finding(s)
- Form reporting (Form No. 1/2/6, Page 700): 1 report(s), 6 finding(s)
- Tariff administration & oversight: 1 report(s), 3 finding(s)
- Informational postings: 1 report(s), 2 finding(s)
- AFUDC / cost of capital: 1 report(s), 1 finding(s)
- Membership dues & industry associations: 1 report(s), 1 finding(s)
- Creditworthiness: 1 report(s), 1 finding(s)
- Capitalization vs. expense: 1 report(s), 1 finding(s)

## Optional
- [Human-readable explorer](index.html)
- [FERC audit reports (primary source)](https://www.ferc.gov/audits)
